colors.scheme: Ultra-dark (rich black) with gold accents, white text

typography.fontType: Serif for headers/brand, sans-serif for UI

shadows.default: Layered gold-tinted shadows, deep glass-dark drop-shadows

shared_components.name: Header
shared_components.purpose: Show brand, navigation, cart access on all pages.

shared_components.name: HeroSection
shared_components.purpose: Introduce the brand and set the ultra-premium tone.

shared_components.name: JewelryCategoriesGrid
shared_components.purpose: Browse by category and filter featured collection in place.

shared_components.name: FeaturedCollectionGrid
shared_components.purpose: Display featured or filtered jewelry products for browsing and purchase.

shared_components.name: ProductDescriptionModal
shared_components.purpose: View jewelry item details and add directly to cart.

shared_components.name: CartDrawer
shared_components.purpose: Show current cart, adjust quantities, start checkout.

shared_components.name: CheckoutSection
shared_components.purpose: Collect customer info and place the (simulated) jewelry order.

shared_components.name: Footer
shared_components.purpose: Premium brand closure, contact info, and minimal links.

layout_plan.composition: Bold left-aligned headline with a teaser of a horizontally-scrolling gallery peeking in beneath.
A horizontally-scrolling row of cards (products / cases / steps) with scroll-snap, inside the vertical page.
A 50/50 split feature row expanding on the most important item.

notes:
TYPOGRAPHY: display font "Marcellus" for headings/hero, body font "Jost" for body/labels — load both from Google Fonts via a <link> in index.html and apply with Tailwind arbitrary classes (font-['Marcellus'] / font-['Jost']). Do NOT substitute DM Serif Display or a generic system font.

Design DNA: Ultra-premium, dark luxury, gold-accented, glassmorphic. Uses Playfair Display (serif) for major headings and brand; Inter for UI and supporting text. All cards, drawers and modals use deep blacks with gold border glows, glass/blurred overlays, and dramatic shadowing. Gold is used sparingly for lines, buttons, and branding. Animations: shimmer, staggered fade/glow, overshoot slide. Generous spacing and oversized visuals. All UI is touch-friendly.. Animation: Gold shimmer, fade, glassmorphic glow, slide in/out. Interaction: Smooth, tactile, luxury-feel transitions; immediate feedback on interactions (glow, ripple, overlay lock).. Color scheme: Ultra-dark (rich black) with gold accents, white text.

LAYOUT ARCHETYPE: horizontal-scroll — build each page from its layout_plan; do NOT collapse into a centered hero followed by a uniform 3-card grid and footer. A card grid, if used, is at most ONE section among differently-composed sections.

REFERENCE DESIGN SYSTEM: airbnb — DISTILL its component treatments (buttons, cards, nav), type scale + tracking, spacing rhythm, and depth/shadow system; match its level of polish. ADAPT the palette to this project's theme — do NOT copy the brand's exact hex values or identity. Avoid generic defaults (raw Tailwind gray text, #3B82F6 blue, system fonts). Brief follows:

---
version: alpha
name: Airbnb-design-analysis
description: A warm, generous consumer marketplace anchored on a clean white canvas and Airbnb Rausch (#ff385c), the single brand voltage that carries every primary CTA, search-button orb, and rating dot. Type runs Airbnb Cereal VF at modest weights — display sits at 22–28px in weight 500/600 rather than the heavy 700+ that fintech and enterprise systems use; the brand trusts photography and generous whitespace over typographic muscle. Three product entries (Homes, Experiences, Services) sit in the top nav with hand-illustrated 32-icon glyphs and "NEW" badges, signaling a marketplace expansion rather than a feature dump. Pill-shaped search bars (`{rounded.full}`), softly rounded property cards (`{rounded.lg}` ~14px), and 32px button radii read as friendly and human — there is no hard corner anywhere except the body grid.
